Pam is also very condescending!! Every time I had a question or didn’t understand something, she was rude and made it seem like I should know already. Also like I was wasting her time.

My last complaint about Pam is that she doesn’t communicate with you at all! I was always in the dark even up to the point of picking up our final paperwork from the court. She called me to say come get it, it’s ready. I showed up on my lunch break and she said “oh I put it in the mail.”. I was fuming!!! My dog communicates better than Pam!!

Find a different attorney to use because you won’t receive good service from Pam!!!!!

Do not use these guys! I went in and I am still dealing with an wrongful termination suite with an ex employer they took the case on with no money down and would just take there cut out of the settlement Wich is great and I was happy to do it this way as I wasn't in it for the money as much as to hope to prevent something similar happening to another employee down the road. Well after about 18 months and no attempt on the end of the Stevenson& Smith firm to ever call with any update it finally got to court well filed with the court that was 4 months ago I was told that they would call when we heard back from the other party well I'm still waiting on a call. The communication with from the law firm is absolutely horrible to the point of disrespectful and plain rude. I have been extremely patient with them as I understand that they are busy and my case not being a high dollar case can be done in between others and alittle at a time. So I was nice and waited. We'll talk about taking advantage of this Stevenson & Smith have taken it to a whole different level that I would have never thought possible by a law firm I am amazed at the amount of disrespect and pure unprofessional service I have received from them I would not send my worst enemy here I will never recommend them to anyone but I will do everything in my power to sway people from even entertaining the idea of using Stevenson & Smith do not do it don't call don't go in and don't think it will be different for you because it won't be turn to the next firm and be glad you're not having to deal with this horrible place! DO NOT USE STEVENSON & SMITH PLEASE HEED THIS WARNING!!!!!!!!!!!!

Professional, knowledgeable, interesting.  It doesn't take a long conversation with either David Stevenson or Brad Smith to know that they have the experience and the wisdom that would warrant a much higher bill if their office was located in downtown Salt Lake.  If you need a lawyer in the Ogden area, you really should give them a call.

Brad Smith is a wonderful attorney. He immediately made me feel confident that he could help me with my case and i cant thank him enough for all he has done for me. If you are looking for an attorney that knows estate law he is the man. I would highly recommend him.

I was impressed with the real estate law attorneys at Stevenson & Smith in Ogden, UT. They provided crucial advice on how to deal with a complicated real estate transaction dealing with a land trust. They were direct and responsive to my calls. I appreciate that they weren't afraid to tell me NOT to do something. Good local attorneys to have on your side if you have any real estate law issues.
Sam was able to look at my case from a different angle and see things that he was able to change to help make a speedy closure and saved me a lot of money.

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

There are good attorneys. There are great attorneys. And then, somewhere far above them all, there is Dylan.

When I first came to him, my life situation was completely upside down. This was a custody case in Utah, which anyone familiar with family court knows can be one of the hardest battles a father can face. For nearly nine years, things had gone the wrong direction and it felt like the system had already written the ending. Then Dylan stepped into the picture with the calm confidence of someone who has clearly stared into legal chaos before and decided it was not that impressive.

He studied every detail of the case, prepared relentlessly, and moved through the process with the kind of focus that makes you think there might be something supernatural going on behind the scenes.

What happened next still feels like something out of a legend.

Through Dylan’s work, my entire situation reversed. In one decisive legal victory, he helped right nearly nine years of wrongs. I walked into the process feeling defeated and walked out feeling like someone had hit the reset button on my life.

If the legal profession had its own mythology, Dylan would already be in it. Part guardian angel, part master strategist, part mythical champion of justice. The kind of person who walks into a courtroom looking like a regular human attorney but secretly has wings folded under his suit jacket and a flaming sword of legal brilliance hidden in his briefcase.

While some attorneys argue cases, Dylan goes to battle for people.

My children, my girlfriend, and I will forever be grateful for the impact Dylan has had on our lives. What he helped accomplish changed the entire direction of our future. Generations from now, my grandchildren and great-grandchildren will hear the story of the moment everything changed, and somewhere in that story there will be a slightly unbelievable character known only as the legendary Dylan.

If you ever find yourself in a situation where everything feels stacked against you and you need someone in your corner who will fight with intelligence, courage, and a level of preparation that borders on heroic, Dylan is the attorney you want.

Five stars feels wildly insufficient, but Google will not let me give him the full constellation he deserves. ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

I hired Ben Larsen to represent me with my custody case. I trusted Ben with something very scary! He stood by my side the entire way. He eased my emotions. He had EMPATHY!!! When it was time to fight, he fought HARD and we WON! He never misled me, he listened and he made me feel safe. I will forever appreciate Ben and I’ll forever recommend Ben! I can’t say enough great things. He’s worth the price. That’s for sure. Thank you to Julie aswell! She was also very helpful and would answer my questions quickly! I appreciate you both so much!
Professional and Responsive!  The firm exceeded my expectations for legal services.  I would refer them to my friends & family.

I finalized a divorce today that dragged on for more than three years, and I felt compelled to write this review immediately. This has been one of the most stressful experiences of my life—and that’s coming from someone with 20 years of military service. Through it all, Dylon Benson of Kaufman, Nichols, and Kaufman was exceptional. He supported me at every turn, went above and beyond, and consistently laid out my options with honesty and awareness of my current financial and legal situations at every step of my case. I can say with complete confidence that no other attorney would have shown the same dedication. Thanks to Dylon’s hard work, I received a fantastic ruling in my favor. If you want a lawyer who will truly fight for you, look no further! Dylan, I sincerely thank you!
It is generous to say that Ben Larsen and his team are skilled at hyperbole. For reference see the sample picture of the moving van large enough to pack a house into.

I am extremely satisfied with Alex.  From the beginning he looked at all the evidence and went through all the possible options and outcomes before advising me. He was spot on with his advise. His fees were reasonable and did not nickle and dime me. He has a fabulous staff and definitely would recommend him.

Dylan Benson has been an incredible advocate. He is responsive, knowledgeable, and genuinely cares about his clients. During a very overwhelming time, he helped me feel supported and protected. I highly recommend him to anyone needing strong, compassionate legal representation. His professionalism, empathy, and dedication mean more than I can put into words. I am so thankful to have him in my corner.
Tyson Stokes and Stephen Leech were wonderful to work with. My situation was long and drawn out and they walked me through every step and answered my countless questions.

Mr. Alexander Smart and his team did a fantastic job reducing my Class B misdemeanor to an Infraction. l highly recommend Mr. Smart if you need a good attorney. He kept me well informed about my case, responded to all of my emails and texts, explained the ordinances and gave me legal advice and representation resulting in a positive outcome.

Kris Kaufman provided excellent advice during my divorce.  Kris did a great job communication and kept me informed at all benchmark occurrences.  Kris was very friendly and professional, I appreciated the proactive work ethic and all efforts from the entire team.

I filed a formal complaint on Dylan Benson through the Office of Professional Conduct in Utah. He is a fairly new attorney with only 5 yrs. experience. The first instance of corruption and lack of integrity from this attorney was when he filed a TRO to try to take my children from me to help his client have a financial upper hand through the divorce process. The TRO was about 99% lies. He was ok about lying to the court I suppose… anything for a win, right? Thankfully, the judge didn’t sign, judge saw through the bs… however still was emotionally traumatizing to me, already being in emotional distress from subsequent personal legal matters. Then, I dealt with this attorney yet again recently and he was dishonest yet again-  produced misleading statements, and just outright made false statements. The judge had to correct him multiple times. He was sloppy.  I will appeal this decision but I feel the most important thing weighing on my mind is this attorney’s lack of professional conduct. Now I am not versed on legal matters or proceedings, but I know corruption when I see it. I am not afraid of him, and he knows it. I directly called out his corruption in front of the judge. I am just saying this as any other person leaving an honest review of their experience. No one should have to put up with a corrupt or abusive lawyer. You can get the truth out of someone without trying to frame them or self incriminate on something they didn’t do that is say unrelated to current case, all well knowing they have had a traumatic year. When I see corruption, I call it out. I defended myself.  He didn’t like that.  I am not afraid of him.

Ben Larson is THE WORST attorney in Ogden, Utah.  His incompetence is incomprehensible.  Can't believe he actually continues to hold his professional license.
I struggle every day with how much I trusted Ben Larson with my life and the amount of my life savings he gave away to my ex because of his lack of interest in me, his paying client. He admitted he did not prepare for hearings.
Didn't have time, he said.   Did not review any documents in our year and a half of negotiations.  Didn't know the difference between Petitoner and Respondent in papers and would not correct his errors.   He "forgot" several times to notify me, his client, of deadlines and court dates, which he missed.  No responses to me, his client, on  requests for advice on strategy.  To this day, I wake up at night angry at the attorney who I was ensured would get me a fair, equitable settlement after 40 years of marriage and Mr. BYU attorney handed it all over to my husband.  Ben wouldn't even take the time to confirm I was legally divorced and left me hanging.  Thanks for nothing.
At every office visit he was constantly on the phone fighting with his wife instead of focusing on the client paying $300 an hour  to get nothing for his lack of professionalism.   What a great guy. I lost hundreds of thousands of dollars of life savings thanks to Ben and his illerate assistant, Lynn.
He also told me to "just give it to him" several times and convinced me to give my ex all of the equity in the house instead of fighting for the half I already paid for and half of the house I legally owned.  He argued with me and so I lost the half of the house I already paid for.  He should be disbarred.
He is the worst person on the planet.
He got me a total settlement of $10,000 on  $2M joint estate.
DON'T TRUST HIM!

I can’t say enough about Ben Larson! This man gets the job done. He’s direct, to the point, and always knows exactly what to say. Ben is incredibly thorough — he digs deep, never misses a single detail, and truly fights for his clients. He came through for me and my family in ways that are beyond words.

All I can say is that God truly works through this man. His dedication, knowledge, and compassion set him apart from any other lawyer I’ve met. He’s easy to work with, yet when it comes to justice, he’s like a pit bull — relentless and determined.

I highly recommend Ben Larson to anyone in need of a strong, trustworthy, and effective attorney. I will forever trust him with any future legal matters. Thank you Ben!

I have asked Tyson Stokes to handle three different cases for me in the last 15 months.  Tyson has earned my complete trust and confidence.  In each case, he found me most agreeable resolutions.  Should I need an attorney in the future, Tyson Stokes will be the one I reach out to.

I've hired Ben twice now and I'd do it again and again in a heartbeat! Unfortunately after my divorce, I continued to have issues with my narcissistic ex. Ben could see how much pain and anguish this was causing to us and our little boys! Ben is a family man and he will NOT put up with abuse. He and his fantastic assistants will have your back and they will give you honest and reliable service which is sometimes hard to find these days. Many thanks to Ben and Julie for hearing our side, allowing us to vent! Family lawyers get to be therapists too and it can't be easy. They were my angels! They always set proper expectations and then absolutely exceeded them. WE WON! Do yourself a favor and call Ben...like yesterday.
Tyson was great he was very helpful and walked me through every step.  He answered all my concerns.  I can't be more thankful.  They where just awesome.
Awesome people and good responsibilities! The acted when I needed them to.

I had the pleasure to work with Dylan Benson, he was super steadfast in what needed to be done, even if it was unmanned territory. Got the job done for what the case was, and left me with an outcome that I thought I wouldn't have gotten/reached. Worth every penny and investment to my future.

The first and only people in my five years of trying to get divorced that said I work for you and what you want matters. Lynn Woodward is the best paralegal I ever known. And Ben was the first Lawyer to ever make me feel like he listened. And not only to know somebody actually heard me and responded in kind.
This firm doesn’t just blow smoke they do what they say. I would Recommend this form to anyone in northern Utah. Best firm ever!!

Kamra Kapp

I worked with Kris and Jennifer. I could not of asked for a better lawyer. He listened to what I wanted and advocated for me and what was in my best interest through the process of a stressful divorce. Jennifer and Kris were always helpful and quick to respond. Kris put up with me to help me understand when I didn’t. Hopefully I won’t need a lawyer again, but Kris’s is defiantly who I will work with again!

I retained Kris Kaufman's legal services to probate an estate, and he did a fantastic job throughout the process. He communicated clearly the legal options at every stage, gave good advice on strategy to consider at each stage, was very prompt in his communications, gave excellent attention to detail, and was friendly and easy to work with. I highly recommend Kris to anyone dealing with an estate, and I would definitely hire him again in the future.

I found myself struggling to find a civil attorney in my area, I had made TONS of calls and was in dire need because not everyone practices Civil law, I worked with Dylan Benson who gave me my daughter back, i was falsely accused and was in a very tough spot with allegations that can permanently damage my record, Dylan made it to where everything was dropped and I kept my child. Beyond grateful. Thank you!

UPDATE: 3-18-25
I originally wrote this review walking out if my court mediation, so happy everything was over and with high hopes to finally see my daughter. I didnt take it down, because its about 40% true. Now that time has passed and my frustration has reached all limits, i felt i fought more than he did, the entire time. He mixed up a few IMPORTANT court dates, had i not  reached out to him the day of (something i shouldnt have to do) we would have completely missed it, he is very inconsistent in answering, VERY, so hard to get a hold of. I felt i was chasing him for mostly everything, again something i shouldnt have to do. Please do adequate research when choosing someone to fight FOR YOU, and your needs. When you pay good money for a service, it shouldn’t make you feel more stressed.

I was greatly disappointed with the services I received from this law firm.  Conversations were constantly changing which made things very difficult to understand and know how to proceed.  This is especially frustrating in the legal realm.  Communication with Lynn was very slow and she was distracted during almost every conversation I had with her.  Documents I sent to the office were not forwarded to respective parties properly which created more work for me to make sure information was received.  They were, however, quick to respond when it came to monetary payments that were due.  If this office is assigned to you for special master purposes, I would suggest an appeal for an office that will do a better job.

Dylan and his team were amazing to work with. They were understanding and patient with me. He took great care of me and went above and beyond what he was paid to do. I will be back anytime I have needs that he can handle. I cannot recommend Dylan and this law firm enough. Ten stars.

Almost two years ago my ex went against our agreement regarding custody of our then 11 year old daughter and sued me for full custody. I was living out of state and was incredibly worried and anxious about how I was going to combat this and get my daughter back. I found Ben Larsen quite by accident but actually it was the luckiest day of my life. From the beginning Ben explained everything to me and whether good or bad he was always honest and upfront. Throughout this time our lives have been on a roller coaster and on more than one occasion I wondered if I would ever get her back. Ben has been steadfast in his support and commitment to reuniting my daughter with me. Against all odds I am happy to say that my daughter is with me and although my case is not yet fully resolved I have the utmost confidence in Ben! He is a wonderful person and an extraordinary attorney! I prayed for strength, guidance and a miracle…Ben Larsen ensured that is what I received!

I recently had the pleasure of working with Dylan Benson during a challenging custody case. From the very beginning, Dylan demonstrated exceptional professionalism and a deep understanding of family law. Their expertise and strategic approach were evident in every step of the process. What stood out the most was Dylan's ability to communicate clearly and compassionately. he took the time to explain every aspect of the case, ensuring that I felt informed and supported throughout. Their dedication to my case was unwavering, and they went above and beyond to achieve a favorable outcome. I highly recommend Dylan (Kaufman Nichols Kaufman) to anyone in need of a custody lawyer. Their commitment to their clients and their impressive legal skills make them an invaluable advocate in any custody battle. Thank you,  DYLAN!! for your outstanding service and support.

Where to even start, Benjamin Larson is your guy if you’re looking for a bulldog who is aggressive, knowledgeable, honest and fights hard for your rights. He gets the work done, he isn’t someone who talks himself up, but he is someone who will be completely honest on what he can do. My case was up against another extremely hard attorney, and Ben made it look so easy. He fought for me, he heard me out, he didn’t take no crap. Ben had a strategy and ultimately it won my case. Finding a honest attorney is never easy, finding someone you can trust with all you have is rare, BUT Ben was an easy YES. If you need an attorney for custody look no where else, you will NOT be disappointed. Also, not to mention his whole team, Lynn & Julie- AMAZING work they do, the stories, cries and worries they have to take on, they did it with grace and compassion. A DEEPEST HEART FELT THANKS TO BENJAMIN LARSON, LYNN & JULIE for all your amazing work!!!! - Brooke Buehler
I have had an enjoyable time working with Kris Kaufman recently. In addition to being a great attorney, I find him be thoughtful, considerate and timely. I highly recommend Kris and firm.
Good
Dylan Benson is spectacular ✨️  He goes above and beyond and really fights for his clients. I don't know what I would have done without his help. He is definitely worth every penny!!

EXCEPTIONAL ATTORNEY** DYLAN BENSON
Dylan T. Benson is truly an exceptional attorney. When my ex-husband unlawfully kept my son from me, I felt hopeless and overwhelmed. From our very first meeting, Dylan’s professionalism and confidence reassured me that I was in the right hands. He was not only incredibly prepared and thorough but also had the strategic mind needed to navigate the complexities of my case. His ability to articulate my position in court was impressive, and his tenacious approach made all the difference. Thanks to Dylan, I was reunited with my son, and I will be forever grateful. If you’re looking for an attorney who is both fierce and compassionate, Dylan T. Benson is your guy.

#custody #divorce

I can’t say enough good things about this firm! Ben, Lynn & Julie in particular. I had a very LONG custody battle and Ben, Lynn & Julie were so kind and helpful through everything!
Thank you guys again🫶🏼
Ben Larsen managed my complicated divorce case with professionalism and expertise. His office staff were great to work with and communicated well. Highly recommend.

Steve and Kris Kaufman have been the go-to for legal counsel for myself and my family for many years.  They have seen us through business issues, personal injury, divorce, etc. and we have always been very happy with their service and professionalism.  Plus, they are good people so meeting with them and the people at their firm is not uncomfortable.  I highly recommend Kaufman, Nichols, & Kaufman.

Honestly, we have nothing but incredible things to say about Ben Larsen and his team! I've had the pleasure of watching Ben in action some years ago on a case, and he's only gotten better with time, which is why he was the only option when we needed his services. He's honest, upfront, dedicated, down to earth, caring, and all around just worth the time and money that goes into obtaining a competent attorney like him. Lynn and Julie are fantastic, patient, kind, empathetic, and on the same level of caring and dedication as Ben. We couldn't ask for a better team to represent us for our needs, and the integrity with which the entire team conducts themselves, is beyond appreciated and noticed. We know whatever the outcome, we chose the very best to represent us, someone dedicated and engaged, and at the end of the day, that is such a comforting feeling. Thanks Ben and team!

Tyson Stokes was a fantastic lawyer. My family was dealing with a family situation that no one can imagine being in. Tyson worked with us on filing emergency guardianship and the hearings that followed. Words that I would use to describe his professionalism include kind, caring, respectful, patient, diplomatic in working with the judge, fair, knowledgeable, and willing to work with all parties for fair compromises. I am grateful for his legal advice and will use him again if in need arises.

My mom hired Ben Larsen for her divorce case and we couldn’t have asked for a better attorney!  My mom told me many times how grateful she was for his team’s work in her case and their willingness to help her through this difficult process.  She originally had a different attorney who she didn’t feel confident would represent her well and who would back down against opposition.  Switching to Ben’s team was the right choice!  He fought to get the right documents when my dad withheld them and didn’t get intimidated when they tried to retaliate.  He made sure my mom got a fair deal and we are very grateful for his help!  I would highly recommend Ben Larsen to anyone.

Edit: I wrote my initial review three years ago and now in 2024 I can confirm that Ben is still a great attorney! I had him help me with a case recently and I am pleased with his work. He and his assistant Julie are the best and I would highly recommend them!
Dylan Benson Helped me tremendously! Made sure I didn’t get screwed over in the whole process

My case required a lawyer proficient in real property matters and I was extremely confident with Kristopher Kaufman (and his team) from day one!! His professionalism is equally matched by his expertise, experience, and compassion (the latter I found made it easier to get through the whole thing). It was an added bonus that his rates, while competitive, are still more affordable than others I had considered.
Ultimately, he is an excellent lawyer! His advice is fair and he always retains your best interests (meaning he will NOT advocate for things from any personal bias). You can be sure your case is handled with the utmost respect and transparency, while you yourself are treated like a human being. If you are looking for an extremely knowledgeable representative for your case, Kris and his team are a first rate choice!

P.S. My case was successfully managed and closed.
dylan benson is the best lawyer he got my child back in my custody

dylan benson was my attorney to get my son back in my custody and he has gonna above and beyond to help me. i walked into his office with no visitation, no custody and walked out with sole custody, child support and everything i needed. he's affordable, blunt and great with communication. i've already referred him to a few of my friends. thank you dylan.

I had used this firm in the past for smaller criminal issues when I was in my 20s and was well defended, so when I recently found the need for a divorce attorney there was no other choice in my mind.   Dylan Benson was assigned and has been my best friend in this fight since day one.  In what would be described by many as the most impossible case to overcome, he never gave up and ensured the end result was something I could agree to.  My account was billed at a very appropriate and affordable rate compared to other firms.   Overall my experience was excellent.

I had Dylan Benson as my lawyer and i’m not even trying to make him sound amazing but he quite literally was the best lawyer a man could’ve asked for. He treated me like i was his kid. Didn’t take any shortcuts in the case and went the extra mile at the end, im so glad he was my lawyer 10/10 recommend!!

I am absolutely thrilled to leave a glowing review for Kris Kauffman, our general counsel/attorney. Kris has proven time and time again to be an exceptional legal mind. His dedication to his clients and his craft is truly inspiring. Kris's depth of legal knowledge, coupled with his meticulous attention to detail, makes him an invaluable asset for anyone seeking legal representation. What truly sets Kris apart is his genuine compassion and unwavering commitment to achieving the best possible outcomes. Whether it's a complex case or a simple contract matter, Kris approaches each situation with a level of expertise that is second to none. Kris Kauffman has my utmost respect and admiration, and I wholeheartedly recommend his services to anyone in need of an outstanding attorney.

I have been a client of Kaufman, Nichols, & Kaufman for many years.  I trust them with all of my legal matters.  Mr. Kris Kaufman is a very respectful and trustworthy attorney, which is not easy to find in other law firms.  If you are looking for legal advice, I highly recommend Kris Kaufman.

I pay for their services. They are cheaper than legal zoom but you get what you pay for. It takes them multiple business days to reply to simple requests in emails, if ever. Often I have to call and ask what is going on and get an update that way. Something is happening over there. I’d avoid their services. I will update this review if they ever improve.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Hello Andrew,

We appreciate your patronage, but sorry to hear about your dissatisfactory experiences. Please reach out to us at customeroutreach@rocketlawyer.com if we can do anything to better assist you at this time.

reviews.text: Nice people

*** Caution ***  Tried the free trial, they couldn't do exactly what we needed which is fine, so we simply canceled the trial 6 months ago. However, they continued to charge us $59.97 for the next 6 months. We called 4-5 times to ask for them to please cancel and refund. Customer Service admittedly said that they see where we have called and cancelled several times  !!! However, they say that they can issue one refund due to their policy. Despite the fact that we tried to cancel 6 months ago and several since. We cancelled again today, so we will see again if they actually do it. Till then I guess we are just out $359.82... (To Be Continued)

Absolute worst. They get you to enroll in free trial and then never alert you of their $40 a month AFTER you signup. It is in tiny "*terms and conditions* when you sign up. You then are never alerted each month as they take $40 as a charge on your credit card. In addition, they never email you or send text each month they take this. Finally they only partially refund you when you find out and demand a refund!

We are  disappointed with Rocket Lawyer’s lack of responsiveness. After multiple calls, voicemails, and emails to their Trademark Department, I have yet to receive a response. We have an urgent Statement of Use (SOU) filing with the USPTO, and despite Rocket Lawyer handling our initial trademark application, their support has been completely unresponsive. If you need reliable legal assistance, I would strongly reconsider using their services.

I hired Rocket Lawyer nearly a year ago for trademark-related services. The initial onboarding process went well, but the experience after that was not as positive. It has been extremely difficult to get in touch with the trademark department once the onboarding stage was completed. The company's trademark team is comprised of only two staff members.
Waste of time, tell people you will charge first...

I wouldn’t even leave 1 star. I don’t remember even signing up for this then started getting random charges to my account. Got no notices that I had a “subscription” and no notices of charges due or options to cancel.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Hey Teri,

We're so sorry to hear about your billing issue and would like to assist you. Please email customeroutreach@rocketlawyer.com or give us a call at 877-881-0947 (M-F, 6am-6pm PT) for assistance.

reviews.text: I have been a customer of Rocket Lawyer since 2019, recently they had a software glitch, spoke to Deandra in Filing Support and she went up and well beyond my expectations for an online document filing company (or at least that was what I thought they only were), now I'm going to strongly consider them for their other services, I was always bragging to others how I set up an LLC while in a waiting room of a doctor's office, well now I can brag about Deandra's personal service and how they should look into their other services just like I am.  Thank you Rocket Lawyer and Thank You Deandra... Larry Violette
reviews.ownerResponse:
Hello Larry,

Thanks so much for your review, we're so glad that your overall experience has been a positive one! Take care.

reviews.text: Scammers! Their free trial automatically converts to the expensive plan, charging you $40 upfront and then whatever amount every month. Shrewdly dishonest!
reviews.ownerResponse:
Hello there,

We're sorry to hear about this! We offer a 7-day Free Trial, which does require credit/debit card information to begin. We do explain at the time of sign up, that as long as it's canceled during the Trial period, there's no billing whatsoever, otherwise it does convert into the Premium Monthly Plan. Please email customeroutreach@rocketlawyer.com so we can better assist you.

reviews.text: Don’t get caught in their 7 day free trial promo online. They get your credit card info and charge you 39.99$ without bringing it to your attention that you just signed up for their premium membership!
reviews.ownerResponse:
Hello Shawnie,

We're so sorry to hear about this matter! Please email us at customeroutreach@rocketlawyer.com with your account information and a brief summary of your situation, so we can better assist.

reviews.text:
Deficient incorporation services. Bad customer service.
If you live in PA save yourself the trouble and go directly to Harrisburg on Monday and Tuesday for expedite service. Two months later and still waiting for an incorporation that could be done in one day.
The time I wasted with them no customer should have to put up with.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Hello Nephtali,

We apologize for your matter, but it looks like this was resolved as of yesterday. Please email us at customeroutreach@rocketlawyer.com or please respond to the refund confirmation with any questions or concerns.

reviews.text: The form they provided was not sufficient so I had to go elsewhere and get it. Meanwhile I signed up for premium service which said I could ask for legal advice for a week but when I called it said they weren’t lawyers! When I asked for a refund I was denied. Hmm don’t recommend

Hey Jodie,

We're sorry to hear about this situation, but we do offer legal advice via consultation, document review, or the Ask a Lawyer box online. We do not have attorneys on hand to call, though. When members call in they're speaking with our customer service. We're more than happy to get this resolved with you, so please email us at customeroutreach@rocketlawyer.com and be sure to include the email address for your account.

reviews.text: Great way to waste time if you need a lease agreement. Filled out the entire form and THEN they tell you to put in your credit card info. Pass
reviews.ownerResponse: We apologize for any confusion, but our 7-Day Free Trial does require card information. We explain this at the time of sign up; so long as the membership is cancelled within the 7 days, there is no billing whatsoever.

reviews.text:
Savannah was so very helpful in response to my many questions!
I would use their service again if I need it again in the future.
I recommend Rocket Lawyer!
Thank-You so much for all your help!
Terri~A Satisfied Customer
reviews.ownerResponse:

reviews.text:
I used Brian and his team for my business bankruptcy and cannot properly explain how frustrating it was working with them. I have been involved with other court cases in the past and this experience was by far the worst experience I have had with an attorney.

Brian and his team were friendly and pleasant to deal with during interactions and I have no complaints there. However, every phase of the bankruptcy took longer than it should have. Our initial filing took nearly 6 months longer than we discussed. Often time Brian would call me at 6 or 7 in the evening on the due date of filings to get information from me so he could make the filing on time.

In other filings, his team neglected to file court mandated reports entirely. To the point where the trustee threatened to file to have our case thrown out.

Lastly, there were many times that I asked pretty simple questions that would go weeks without a response. I would have to email/call multiple times to get any response.

I would not recommend his services to anyone.
They were a tremendous help every step of the way.
reviews.ownerResponse: Rick, we are so glad it all worked out well!!!!

reviews.text: After a long and exhausting fight, I can honestly say I wouldn’t have wanted anyone else in my corner but Justin, Alaina, Kim and Pyper. Their professionalism, persistence, and strength never wavered  even when the process tested every ounce of patience and grit. From day one, they treated my case like it mattered. They communicated clearly, fought smart, and carried the weight when things got heavy. Alaina’s attention to detail and calm under pressure kept me grounded, and Justin’s strategy, confidence, and leadership brought this case home exactly how it needed to end. What stands out most is not just their skill as attorneys, but their character as people they truly care. They gave me peace of mind through something that could have broken me otherwise, and I’ll always be grateful for that. This process to build a case takes time, effort, knowledge and experience so if you want the most out of your case, this law firm is a no brainer. Stay away from the billboard law firms, I originally went with The Advocates and what a joke that was but that was short lived and switched over to Farr Cragun and Berube after 5 months. I’m 2 1/2 years into my case and it’s finally done. Justin and Alaina hit a grand slam getting me a very generous settlement. If you’re looking for a firm that’s relentless, trustworthy, and built on integrity, stop searching you’ve found them.

reviews.ownerResponse: Kurt, when we met with you at your free immigration consultation, we reviewed with you your situation and described our extensive immigration experience in successfully helping other clients navigate the complex immigration system. At the end of the consultation you told us that you believed you could handle the matter yourself to avoid incurring any fees.  When you made this choice, we explained to you the risks of going it alone.  Despite this, you elected to not retain AMP Law.  You never paid our firm any compensation to represent you, nor did our firm ever represent you, in your adjustment of status.  As forewarned, your choice not to hire us or any other attorney caused your case to go, as you put it, “really wrong.”  We are sorry for your circumstance, but bear no responsibility for it.  Although we can understand your desire to blame us for your choices, the claims and accusations you posted are wholly unfounded and untrue.  We remain confident that had you retained us, we could have obtained for you the same positive results that we have achieved for countless other immigrants in your situation.

I would like to express my sincere gratitude for the exceptional legal representation I received from Peter Bracken and paralegal Melody Turner at Burton Family Attorneys. During my recent divorce, my ex-wife hired one of the most prominent all-women law firms in Utah, seemingly aiming to maximize her claims. Despite this challenge, Peter and Melody were instrumental in protecting my interests and ensuring I was not financially devastated. This divorce knocked the wind out of me, but Peter and Melody had my back. They not only protected me but were also patient and sympathetic throughout this incredibly difficult process.

Peter is very articulate and knowledgeable about the law, and his expertise was evident every step of the way. The entire team operates with remarkable efficiency, which significantly reduced my legal expenses—my costs were a fraction of what my ex-wife incurred.

I genuinely appreciate the dedication and professionalism shown by Peter and Melody. If I ever find myself in need of legal support again, I would not hesitate to return to Burton Family Attorneys. Highly recommended!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for your review. We appreciate the opportunity to be in your corner to make sure your main interests were made a priority. We wish you all the best going forward.

reviews.text: I changed representation early in the process to Burton Family Attorneys, and it was the best decision I could have made. Peter and his team (including Melody) have been excellent to work with. Peter's knowledge of the law, his ability to be analytical without emotion, but also having compassion and understanding, has been invaluable during the process. We had an agreement in mediation, which I thought would be impossible. While not ideal (usually for anyone), it was probably the best outcome for all parties. reviews.text:
Hey ladies,

I wanted to give you all a heads up about this law-firm. I started working with them about a year ago when I filed for a divorce.  My situation is not complicated and I asked for very little.  Unfortunately my needs and concerns ignored and I was talked down to by my own attorney.  When I was unhappy with the options given at mediation I was told “You can always just stay married.” My mediation paperwork didn’t include hard deadlines which I was unaware of the importance of having them until I had already signed the mediation agreement.  I feel like my attorney should have known to put those in because now I am having to live with my ex until he works with me to sell our home which is a nightmare.  My divorce papers got sent to the court missing forms and therefore got rejected and i had to pay to have it filed again. When i requested email correspondence to save money my attorney pressured me to communicate over the phone.  When he called, Troy would always take approximately 30 min to unnecessarily recap the case.  It felt like he was either doing it to run the clock or because he honestly forgot who I was. The initial meeting that was offered free of charge due to a loss of another attorney within the law firm  was billed as 2 separate meetings without me being told they so they could charge me while making it look like I was getting a deal. I have spent over $14,000.  I’m still married and still having to live with my ex due to uneven distribution of debt and no hard timelines and I have had to retain a new lawyer at a different law firm. When I brought up my grievances Erin my experience was invalidated and was told I should be getting yet another invoice soon. Take my experience as a warning a please choose another law firm.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Cassandra, we’re sorry you were dissatisfied with your case and the delays, there were certainly some unusual circumstances at play, some of which were out of our control. Your review is missing some key information, most of which we won’t outline here. We wish you had reached out to us, so we could have addressed your concerns, but we simply received notice from your new attorney without communication from you.

Mediation can be a long and stressful experience. Troy never meant for his comment to be taken seriously, or to come off as insensitive, he was simply hoping to lift your spirits and remain optimistic during a moment that can often feel intense and emotionally exhausting. He has apologized if it was taken in any other manner. That wasn’t made clear to him, or he would have made it right. Additionally, Troy has a responsibility to ensure you fully understand what you are entitled to. Our priority is to protect our clients' long-term interests, and we want to prevent situations where a client may face difficulties in the future due to concessions made to ease initial tensions. Sometimes a difficult situation initially can significantly pay off in the long run, we’re sorry that we didn’t see eye to eye on this.

Erin has dedicated a significant amount of time to trying to address your concerns. This includes an extensive call with you, and following up with our team members to ensure we are continuing to offer the exceptional standard of care we are known for. It’s unfortunate you reflected your call with her in such a negative light, being that you portrayed that things were resolved at the conclusion of the call.

We did our best to support your decision to hire new counsel and immediately provided you with all case information requested. We have again attempted to contact you to try to address any unresolved concerns, but haven’t heard back from you. We hold no resentment, and will still welcome a call to discuss the matter further. We are committed to offering the highest level of service, and would still appreciate the opportunity to discuss your concerns further. We hope things go well with your case moving forward.

reviews.text:
This is a difficult review to write, since I worked with some amazing people here. I was originally going to give 3 stars, but have decided that since the majority of my bill was my attorney, the majority of my rating should be based on his performance, or lack thereof.
My experience with Troy can be summed up as expensive and frustrating. During one of my earlier meetings, he told me he “knew some great mediators,” but never bothered to explain to me when and why I needed one. The first document I received from him was a very vague Petition, with missing information - that they had requested and I provided - and had no provisions that I wanted and several I disagreed with. Yet somehow, they had billed almost my entire $3,000 retainer to produce this one draft. When I questioned the egregious amount, Troy simply dismissed it as “sticker shock” and provided no further explanation, so I declined to discuss the petition further.
I met with the managing attorney, Ken; he was very kind, knowledgeable, and attempted to fix the situation, even giving some billing credit. He explained to me how my case should have been handled and answered all of my questions that Troy was either unable or unwilling to in all of our conversations combined. Ken convinced me to continue working with Troy, which I now deeply regret. It’s my understanding that Ken spoke with Troy about the issues that day, yet I did not hear from Troy for over a week; and when I did, he called me from his car and spoke over top of me the entire time.
I ended up having to draft my own Settlement Agreement and provide it to Troy; no mediator, no professional assistance. All of this while trying to help my wife, who was pro se; since the plan was for me to hire an attorney to simply help us with paperwork. Everything said and done, just short of $6,000 for a divorce that never went to court, nor even went to mediation, and I was left to learn the law and draft documents on my own, something that should never be burdened on a paying client.
Now, I would like to thank those who were good to me. Livi, my paralegal, who was new to the position but performed above and beyond expectation. Darin, the financial manager, who helped me several times with billing questions and concerns. Ken, who took the time to meet with me and attempt to remedy the situation. And Caprice, who always answered the phone with a smile in her voice and helped me with scheduling and getting in touch with everyone.
So, my final takeaway for you is, this isn’t necessarily a bad firm, they come highly recommended; but they appear to have a bad apple amongst them. Also, the divorce was eventually finalized; but the amount of stress that was placed on me getting there was not even by my now ex-wife, but by the professional who was supposed to be representing me and my best interests.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Hi Travis, we are glad you were happy with the majority of your experience with our office. We have a wonderful team and we care a lot about our clients and the service we provide. We tried to resolve your outstanding concerns, including attempting to contact you again after you posted this review, but did not receive a response. In addition to those efforts, please find a response directly from Troy.

"I am deeply saddened that you were not satisfied with the services I provided to you. I am also surprised because you did not raise any concerns with me directly and you declined to speak to me when my team reached out to you. When we finally did speak in a courtesy call (at no charge), after your meeting with firm management, you indicated to me that everything was on track. At no time after that call did you make me aware of any further concerns. I would have been happy to discuss any concerns with you if you would have reached out to me.

I am heartened to know you were satisfied with the overall services provided by my team and the rest of the firm. It is always my goal to ensure clients are educated about their rights within the law and that I can get them to a better place by the end of the case. At your initial consultation I gave you a general overview of what to generally expect as part of your case plan. You were given the opportunity to review and approve the petition before it was filed. I was not made aware of any issues or concerns you had with the petition until after it was filed. We did not engage the services of a mediator because you indicated the parties were in agreement as to the resolution of the issues in the petition so mediation was no longer necessary. I suggested you provide us with a summary of your agreement so we could draft a stipulation and final case documents in an effort to streamline services, save you money, and finish your case. During the entire tenure of your case, you never complained to me directly or asked to speak to me about the issues you are now raising in your review. If you would please reach out to me, I remain willing to discuss your concerns. I never want a client to feel disappointed or dissatisfied at the conclusion of their case.
Thanks
-Troy"

reviews.text: I was very disappointed with my service with this firm.  If you want a paralegal that only works 2-3 days per week with limited hours those days, than this law firm is for you.  Six months after I have settled, and was promised everything was paid for, i got a bill for almost $250. After calling and bringing the bill in, they tell me the gal working my case no longer works there and they are sorry they missed this bill, but there is nothing they can do about it.  They also stated that I am fully responsible for any copayments, even though I was the victim in this accident.  Throughout my case I was encouraged to get additional injections and keep going to the doctor for any medication they recommended, to ensure I had a strong case.  Physical therapy was working for me and I wasn't out to make a bunch of money, I just wanted to be healed fully, not medicated all the time so I didn't feel the pain. This firm is all about them making a buck, not about you getting healed and getting your bills paid.  I would strongly recommend trying a different law office.  I will never recommend this place to anyone that wants to be treated fairly.
reviews.ownerResponse:
We sincerely hope you will be able to find happiness and joy in your life in 2020. Nevertheless, we must correct false representations. Our office did not miss any of your medical bills. The recent $105 bill that was not paid from your settlement was because of your written representation (on October 23, 2018) that you would pay that bill directly; we cannot force you to honor your word. Still, with the funds we obtained and provided to you, you were financially able to pay that bill,100 times over.

Please recall, we have five full-time paralegals, in addition to one part-time paralegal. And, as you know, the one part-time paralegal never worked on your bills. Rather, as a courtesy, she used her decade of experience to correct a unique error made by your insurance company; an error that was not created by us or due to the at-fault driver. Further, despite your unrelenting anger at incurring medical bills (something that is unavoidable if you suffer an injury), we facilitated payment of those bills, leaving your credit unaffected. And, despite no financial benefit to us, we negotiated the bills to ensure a greater amount of the settlement funds went into your pocket. You were not “forced” to make co-pays. You elected to utilize your health insurance so you could see the doctor of your choice and receive additional discounts. (For example, on physical therapy, you paid approx. $200 on $3,000 in treatment.) This process created additional work for us, without an increased fee. It was financially beneficial for you to have us perform the extra efforts associated with us working through your health insurance but, it was not a requirement.

Lastly, we stand by the accurate legal advice provided to you. If injured due to someone’s else fault, Utah law requires you care for your injuries and follow medical advice. (This is a legal duty, regardless if the advice is injections, medications, or simple dietary changes.) A lawyer’s duty is to protect you by advising you of the law. It was crucial to inform you that ignoring the advice of your physician hurts your claim. Just as with the doctor’s advice, you were welcome to ignore that legal information (and did). However, if we were only advising you of your legal duty because of our fee or greed, we would have terminated representation when you declined to follow medical recommendations. Instead, we successfully obtained reimbursement of wage loss, household services, medical bills and significant pain & suffering. Although we lost money on our representation of you, you did not. You were provided accurate legal advice, while being fully reimbursed for your losses. You had successful representation and there was nothing more we could have done. As Abraham Lincoln said, “Folks are usually about as happy as they make up their minds to be.”

reviews.text:
I was in an MVA 4 ½ years ago, and was recommended by two of my doctors to retain a personal injury attorney. I didn’t know anything about the legalities of personal injury, so I asked a few attorneys about their recommendation. 4 out of 5 attorneys referred me to Lindy saying she was a ‘bulldog.’ That proved true. She was great at educating me with clear direction on my choice to either settle early or continue forward waiting to see how my recovery panned out. She respected that opening a personal injury lawsuit is a stressful situation, and some individuals wish to settle sooner, but if they do, it’s over and they won’t have a possible settlement to cover the scope of potential injuries that may manifest over time. I chose to continue forward and be patient. While my initial recovery was mostly based on severe whiplash and some back/spine issues, 18 months later I had my first knee surgery. At that point I was regularly having my knee drained of fluid, multiple injections to relieve the pain, along with being posed with multiple restrictions such as no more running, no more kneeling, etc. If I had settled prematurely, I would have never had the opportunity to be compensated for these life-long injuries I sustained.

In my discussions with her, she seems to have more knowledge about medical injuries than some doctors! She is the legal shield and knows what she is doing, and handled all the communication with the medical and car insurance companies. While being in the middle of an overwhelming situation, any client of Lindy’s is going to completely taken care of. I realized the caliber of her capability as time went on, and became more and more grateful I had retained her. I also worked with Janeth, Pam, Nichole and Stephanie, who were all patient, educating, and guided me through every step of the way. While no one wishes to be in a car accident, retaining Lindy and her staff turned that difficult, painful, and very stressful situation into the most positive outcome that it could be. I recommend everyone to Lindy and her great team.

Our journey began shortly after I returned from the last deployment of my career.  I learn that my children had been moved across the country and I was being told I could only see them on/around summer break and winter breaks.  This was alarming given that I was court ordered the majority custody of my children.
After one hearing with Porter Law Firm my children were returned into my custody.  Unfortunately, what seemed to be a simple enforcement issue, became a bit of a living nightmare.
I started working initially with Cassidy, who is a really amazing and caring person, but shortly thereafter worked mostly with Stephanie and Jon directly.  Stephanie has been nothing short of phenomenal, there have been too many instances in which I have needed her and Jon's expert advice, and albeit this moderately  simple enforcement case became quite complex in the blink of an eye. With that being said, given the complexity, Stephanie and Jon are great at providing quick and accurate answers to the many questions I have had.  We are nearing what I hope to be the conclusion of this ordeal and regardless of the outcome, I have felt that they have been there for me when I needed them the most.  To be a little more descriptive, there have been many conversations derived by a lot of emotions, (and admittedly I can be a bit long winded) yet each time I am in contact with them it really feels like they are hearing me as more than that of a client, but as a person.
While it has been difficult to process that sometimes things take longer than what I would hope they did, I can say that after working with Porter Law-Firm for well over a year, I am grateful for all they have done to help!

reviews.text: If the courts appoint this lawyer to represent you. He will not do anything other then speak in court. I literally had to do his job for him. Any good reviews he has can only be people who have paid him or he's paid them off to file them. You will have better luck researching the laws and representing yourself.
reviews.ownerResponse: Facts: Charged with two cases, Case 1: F3 Aggravated Assault, MB Assault, MB (3 Counts) DV in the Presence of Child; Case 2: MA Violation of Protective Order.  At the second hearing when I represented Derek, he was in jail and the State was requesting he be held with no bail.  He was booked in jail on 7/8/2 and he was released to Pre-Trial services, based upon a negotiation I achieved on his behalf and represented to the court, and Derek did not even have to post any bail to be released.  He was out of custody as the cases progressed, both cases were ultimately dismissed.  Some people are never satisfied regardless of what you do for them.  Again, my office will do everything to help those in need, regardless of their false allegations or misrepresentations.  Best wishes and God Bless.

DO NOT USE if you are a male!!  Bryce Froerer specifically!! I have two boys from different mothers five months apart both mothers are drug attic’s I hired Bryce to get custody of my kids.

It seemed every time we went to court he kept giving her chances she turned in dirty ways was in a treatment program and instead of just getting it over she offered to give her a chance!??
He offered me a deal on the second kid but never did. The second mother missed the first court date came into the second one and signed over to give up the kid. Iwanted it changef he told me it be OK because it’s just a given and didn’t need to be written in.  well it’s not a given and it’s not written in the paperwork so it didn’t count and not a given!!  eight years later as I’m getting into problems it’s big problems ..do not get involved with Bryce Froerer. I have had the pleasure of working with Rimrock Law Firm, and I must say, they have been exceptional. My son and I were involved in a terrible car accident on August 10th, 2024, where we were struck by a semi-truck. My son sustained a seatbelt bruise and a broken collarbone, while I suffered more severe injuries, requiring a three-day hospital stay. A friend recommended Rimrock Law, and upon meeting with them, I felt a sense of reassurance, knowing they would advocate for my son and me. Tyler and Tabitha were outstanding, keeping me informed throughout the process and even checking in on me during my recovery. Their genuine concern for their clients' well-being is truly impressive. What I thought would be a year-long, or even two-year-long, case was resolved in just seven months, resulting in a fair settlement. I am deeply grateful for Rimrock Law's exceptional service and would highly recommend them to anyone seeking a reliable and compassionate law team.

reviews.text:
A few years ago, I was involved in a car accident. The legal process was long and confusing with another firm—especially because, at that time, I didn’t have the knowledge I have today.

Everything changed the day I attended a seminar hosted by this firm for Father’s Day. I received a book that contained all the answers to the questions I had been asking myself for years. I finally understood how the legal process works after an accident—what to do, what not to do, whether you’re the victim or at fault.

For me, information is power. When I receive it, I share it. These seminars have given me the opportunity to learn about essential topics and meet dedicated professionals who work to empower the community through education, respect, and recognition.

The most important thing to remember when making a legal decision is to educate yourself and choose someone who truly understands your needs. That’s why I invite everyone to attend these seminars—they are incredibly valuable.

On a personal note, there’s no way I can repay the smile Kramer Group put on my children’s faces during the youth seminar. I have nothing more to give but these words of deep gratitude, admiration, and appreciation for their service and commitment to the community.

Thank you from the bottom of my heart.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your thoughtful review. I'm really happy to hear that our seminar was of benefit to you. We take pride in letting people know what their rights are and in encouraging them to make sure they exercise their rights. Next time, please ask for me personally if you have a new case you or a friend need help with. All the best, Ron Kramer

reviews.text:
I will start off by saying it's a great relief having someone on your side especially when they are as capable and effective as this team has been for me.
From the very beginning they were supportive and were able to reassure me that I didn't have to worry about anything. This was true the entire time as the other insured driver had an insurance company that gave me trouble from the word go.
Know that when you are in an auto accident or in another situation that you have questions about
your best action is to call
Siegfried and Jensen and let them represent you.
The persons you are up against have a legal team and a strategy already in place. Don't start out thinking you can handle it alone.
I was hit by an underinsured out of state driver. I was left with a disabled car which then took me over a week to get a rental car. Even that was a fight. I knew I would have medical expenses and then I finally got smart and called for help.
Call them first and let them take care of it without all the stress.
Thanks Julie,Jennifer, and everyone at Siegfried and Jensen
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your kind review! We appreciate you reaching out and allowing us the opportunity to help navigate this process. reviews.text: My husband and I got into an unfortunate car accident only three months into our marriage. We were both on our way to drop off dinner for a friend  who just had knee surgery. We were scared and didn’t know who to call. My in laws advised us to get a lawyer involved and looking into reviews and such we came across Siegfried and Jensen and decided to go with them. Best decision we could’ve made, not only did they help us with the process of dealing with insurances and hospital bills, they were patient and kind with all our questions and concerns through out the whole process. My husband and I are very thankful! Shout out to Todd specifically! Highly recommend talking to him! Thanks guys!

reviews.text: HIGHLY RECOMMEND this firm!!! I’d been a passenger of a car accident with my daughter and grand daughter. I suffered extensive injuries to my back that will lead to treatments and therapy for the rest of my life. Nikole, my paralegal held my hand throughout everything. I didn’t know how to navigate the whole legal aspect of this or even where to start. Which I didn’t need to know because she handled all of that while I focused on trying to heal. Nikole truly cared about me recovering and healing from my injuries. I spent many times emotional from being frustrated that treatments weren’t working, the extreme amount of pain I was dealing with and she listened and truly had compassion for what I was mentally and physically going through. When you are going through something like this that has altered your normal life you need someone who truly cares about you.  Nikole handled a lot of things for me but also my attorney Spencer was quick to interact with Nikole on my case when needed. My case is not completely over yet but I have complete faith in their firm that they will be able to get me fair compensation for future treatment/procedures for my injuries and the cost that has accrued thus far. I hope and pray I never have to go through this again but I have ease knowing I have a trustworthy law firm if needed.
reviews.ownerResponse: Annie, thank you!! We are so sorry you, your daughter and granddaughter had to go through that. We cannot express how thankful we are that Spencer and Nikole had the opportunity to care for you throughout this process. Your health and recovery, both mental and physical, are the number one priority. Thank you for trusting us through such a stressful time!

reviews.text: Straight scam artists. They told me I could do a chapter 13 and itd be a fixed rate of $100 + a processing fee of $3.99, ok great. Then let me know id have to pay out of my taxes $1039 or so, ok great no issue. Paid ever penny on time and almost always year later I get a call "hey we are canceling your case because you didn't pay your tax amount", uhh yes the heck i did in 2 payments over $600, they look and boom they see it but they labeled it apparently wrong in the system so used it for the monthly payments AND increased the cost to $300/month and claimed they notified me, where is said correspondence? Mystically no one knows but they "sent it out", why was it not mentioned the dozens of times I called? No one knows. These people aren't here to help you they are here to milk you dry then cancel cases at the end DO NOT WORL WITH THEM.
I had a great experience working with MLG for my chapter 7 bankruptcy. Everything was very straight forward and easy. I worked with Bella and Lindsay and they were awesome.

I got more help from a random attorney I called in a panic..

I was told everything was done on my case but other information provided , that’s not the accurate , there is a lack of documentation being provided was a BIG thing which is crazy because they received everything over a month before ..

reviews.ownerResponse:
I try to be very professional in my responses, even to negative reviews. But in this case I can't let your behavior go unchecked. In 20 years of practicing bankruptcy, in my opinion I have never had to deal with a worse person than you. While people have bad days and bankruptcy is stressful, that does not give you the right to berate my staff. We try to be very empathetic, but you cannot act like you do and expect us to just accept that. I care too much about my staff to let someone like you treat them so poorly. And BTW, how did you provide us the documents 30 days in advance when the documents we requested for court didn't even exist until after your case was filed and it was less than 30 days from filing to your hearing.
Theron

reviews.text: Things were going amazingly well 5 years into my own construction business. Growing 50% year over year. I created a new name/concept and invest a large amount of money and time. All of a sudden inflation and interest rates rise and home sales plummet and I wasn't prepared. I found myself in a position where I had to lay off all five employees, surrender my office, along with many other cost measures... Just when I thought that was enough, I struggled with the basics (shelter, food) and my wife of 30 years. From there I felt all I have left is my integrity/morals and even that was not enough... 🤦‍♂️ At some point I had to ask for help. Don't worry/stress anymore! I promise it's going to be okay. The team at Morrison Law Group will take care of you! Their compassion and customer service are second to none! If I could have done anything differently I would have asked for help a lot sooner than 7 months of suffering. You can't regret/change the past nor predict the future. Just live for today because that's really all any of us have. THANK YOU Theron, Tamie, Bella, Julie, Erika, Gaby, Dominique
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you for trusting Morrison Law Group during such a difficult time. We are sorry to hear about the struggles you faced with your business and personal life, but we are grateful that you reached out to us for help.
Our team is dedicated to providing compassionate support and exceptional customer service to all of our clients. We understand that asking for help can be difficult, but we promise to do everything in our power to assist you and ease your worries. Your integrity and morals are admirable qualities that will serve you well in the future.
We appreciate your kind words and recommendation of our services. We hope that things continue to improve for you, and please know that we are always here for you if needed.

The difference between any attorney and their specialty of practice is how devoted they are in the court room and the case they are on. When facing any difficult case it's important to recognize that you may not always walk away with the intended result you desire, but you will walk away with the least possible damage an attorney can give performing his best.

The best thing about Nathan Carroll is once he makes a deal with you to defend you, he keeps it. His costs are reasonably priced, and depending on the case he may work with you on a payment plan. He is an independent attorney, so there are no overhead costs incorporated into his billing scheme. He is feedback sensitive, so as long as you are honest and down to earth about the reality of your case, he will be forward in his abilities to defend you.
